DESKTOP.arrangement: Desktop uses a readable header region above a main container with state groups in scan order.
DESKTOP.width_behavior: Wide width may use denser rows, while required information still wraps before minimum readable width.
DESKTOP.height_scroll_behavior: Short height keeps all state and message information reachable through vertical scroll.
DESKTOP.navigation_placement: Navigation and return affordance remain in the header region.
DESKTOP.safe_area_or_system_bars: Desktop window chrome and system bars are respected without hiding content.
DESKTOP.input_keyboard_behavior: Keyboard focus does not cover required status or blocked message content.

TABLET.arrangement: Tablet reduces columns and stacks state groups while preserving semantic order.
TABLET.width_behavior: Tablet width stacks and wraps state content before clipping.
TABLET.height_scroll_behavior: Tablet height uses vertical scroll and sticky access to the current state.
TABLET.navigation_placement: Navigation remains in a top region or carrier-appropriate side rail.
TABLET.safe_area_or_system_bars: Tablet system bars and split view inset are respected.
TABLET.input_keyboard_behavior: Keyboard inset keeps the blocked message and recovery text reachable.

MOBILE.arrangement: Generic mobile uses a single-column stack with ready, blocked, and human review waiting states in order.
MOBILE.width_behavior: Mobile width wraps labels and stacks metadata; horizontal scroll is not the default.
MOBILE.height_scroll_behavior: Mobile height uses vertical scroll, expansion, and same-surface disclosure.
MOBILE.navigation_placement: Navigation remains in a top or bottom carrier-appropriate region.
MOBILE.safe_area_or_system_bars: Mobile system bars and edge insets are reserved.
MOBILE.input_keyboard_behavior: Keyboard inset keeps required state and message content accessible.

MOBILE_IOS.arrangement: iOS mobile keeps the single-column stack inside a navigation stack.
MOBILE_IOS.width_behavior: iOS width wraps content inside safe area before any truncation.
MOBILE_IOS.height_scroll_behavior: iOS short height uses vertical scroll and same-surface disclosure.
MOBILE_IOS.navigation_placement: iOS navigation stack keeps return placement above the state content.
MOBILE_IOS.safe_area_or_system_bars: iOS safe area reserves status bar and home indicator space.
MOBILE_IOS.input_keyboard_behavior: iOS keyboard avoidance keeps the blocked message reachable.

MOBILE_MATERIAL.arrangement: Material mobile uses a single-column stack under an app bar with bottom action space.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.width_behavior: Material width wraps and stacks content before truncation.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.height_scroll_behavior: Material short height uses vertical scroll, snackbar recovery, and disclosure.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.navigation_placement: Material app bar and bottom action placement preserve return context.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.safe_area_or_system_bars: Material system bar and edge inset are reserved.
MOBILE_MATERIAL.input_keyboard_behavior: Material keyboard inset keeps dialog, snackbar, and blocked message content reachable.
